faq.title: We answer
faq.description: We answer the most common questions from our patients before their consultation.

recovery.question: How long does recovery take?
recovery.answer: Recovery time varies depending on the procedure. Generally, facial procedures require 1-2 weeks, while body surgeries may need 2-4 weeks before resuming normal activities.

permanent.question: Are the results permanent?
permanent.answer: Most surgical procedures offer lasting results. However, factors such as natural aging, weight changes, and lifestyle can affect long-term results.

anesthesia.question: What type of anesthesia is used?
anesthesia.answer: Depending on the procedure, we use local anesthesia, sedation, or general anesthesia. Dr. Sinchi will evaluate your particular case and recommend the safest and most comfortable option.

financing.question: Do you offer financing?
financing.answer: Yes, we have flexible financing options so you can proceed with your procedure. Contact our team to learn about available plans.

finalResults.question: When can I see the final results?
finalResults.answer: Initial results are visible within the first few weeks, but the final result is appreciated 3-6 months after the procedure, once swelling has completely subsided.

location.title: Visit us in

facial.title: Facial Plastic Surgery
facial.description: Procedures designed to enhance your natural beauty and correct imperfections with advanced techniques and harmonious results.

blepharoplasty.name: Blepharoplasty
blepharoplasty.description: Eyelid rejuvenation by removing excess skin and bags.

lifting.name: Lifting / Fox-eyes
lifting.description: Brow lift, Fox-eyes, frontal, facial and cervical lifting.

rhinoplasty.name: Rhinoplasty

facialFillers.name: Facial Fillers
facialFillers.description: Restore volume with autologous fat, hyaluronic acid or implants.

otoplasty.name: Otoplasty
otoplasty.description: Correction of prominent ears, reduction or reconstruction.

moleRemoval.description: Safe removal of moles and skin lesions with pathological analysis.

mentoplasty.description: Chin augmentation or reduction to balance the facial profile.

chinLipo.description: Removal of submental fat to define the neck contour.

bichectomy.description: Removal of Bichat fat pads to slim the cheeks.

liposculpture.description: Remove localized fat and shape your figure with high-definition techniques.

lipoabdominoplasty.description: Combines liposuction with abdominoplasty for comprehensive results.

gluteoplasty.name: Gluteoplasty
gluteoplasty.description: Augment and shape your buttocks with your own fat or implants.

mommyMakeover.description: Restore your figure after pregnancy with multiple combined procedures.

gynecomastia.name: Gynecomastia
gynecomastia.description: Correction of excess breast tissue in men.

genderSurgery.name: Gender Surgery

breastReconstruction.name: Breast Reconstruction
breastReconstruction.description: Breast reconstruction post mastectomy or trauma.

aesthetic.description: Rejuvenate and beautify your face with state-of-the-art non-invasive treatments, no surgery and immediate results.

hyaluronicAcid.description: Restore facial volume and hydration with state-of-the-art fillers.

botox.description: Eliminate expression wrinkles and prevent new facial lines.

biostimulators.description: Stimulate natural collagen production to rejuvenate your skin.

postoperative.description: Speed up your recovery and optimize your surgery results.

prp.name: Platelet Rich Plasma
prp.description: Regenerate your skin with growth factors from your own blood.

vitaminC.name: Intravenous Vitamin C
vitaminC.description: Powerful antioxidant that brightens and revitalizes your skin from within.

lipFillers.name: Lip Fillers
lipFillers.description: Increase volume and define your lip contour naturally.

reconstructive.title: Reconstructive Surgery
reconstructive.description: Specialized procedures to restore form and function of tissues affected by trauma, disease, burns, or previous surgeries.

intro.title: More than aesthetics, quality of life
intro.description: Reconstructive surgery goes beyond appearance. Our goal is to restore function, relieve pain, and restore confidence to patients who have suffered trauma, illness, or conditions affecting their physical and emotional well-being.

whyChooseUs.title: Experience in complex cases
whyChooseUs.description: Reconstructive surgery requires a high level of specialization and experience. Dr. Sinchi combines knowledge in plastic and reconstructive surgery to offer comprehensive solutions.

tumors.name: Tumors and Carcinomas
tumors.description: Oncologic resection with immediate aesthetic reconstruction.

scars.name: Scars
scars.description: Treatment and correction of scars to improve their appearance.

wounds.name: Wounds and Ulcers
wounds.description: Specialized treatment of chronic wounds and ulcers.

burns.name: Burns
burns.description: Reconstruction and treatment of burn sequelae.

biopolymerRemoval.name: Biopolymer Removal
biopolymerRemoval.description: Safe removal of unauthorized substances from the body.

doctorPage.fullBio: Dr. Manuel Sinchi is a distinguished plastic surgeon trained at the best medical institutions in Peru and abroad. His approach combines advanced surgical techniques with deep respect for each patient's natural anatomy, always seeking harmonious results that enhance individual beauty.
doctorPage.cvIntroduction: With over a decade dedicated to plastic surgery, reconstructive surgery and aesthetic medicine, Dr. Manuel Sinchi has built a solid professional career backed by excellent training both in Peru and at prestigious international centers. His commitment to constant updating and adoption of cutting-edge techniques allows him to offer his patients the highest standards of quality and safety.
